metadata.name: XTTS v2 Base
metadata.description: The default Coqui XTTS v2 checkpoint bundled with the runtime image (coqui/XTTS-v2). Fine-tuned, community, and imported Hugging Face XTTS checkpoints attach to this same runtime as additional RuntimeVariants (ADR-0018/0019) — no new image, no new model id. XTTS is the strongest validation target for the Runtime Variants checkpoint ecosystem (Task 30, see VALIDATION/RESEARCH/task-30-xtts-discovery.md §6).
